creator: schilling@fokus.gmd.de
text:
>From ibex@emmi.physik.TU-Berlin.DE Sat Feb 24 12:06:59 2001

>On Thu, Feb 22, 2001 at 07:16:23PM +0200, Peter Pentchev wrote:
>> [...]
>> Should some recent __FreeBSD_version bump be used (I think the last one
>> was quite a while ago..), or should we wait for 4.3-RELEASE and use its
>> new __FreeBSD_version instead?

>We should rather bump __FreeBSD_version for -CURRENT and -STABLE
>now to reflect this change.

>On the other hand it would be really nice if mkisofs wouldn't use
>internal functions... 

>BTW, Joerg, is there any specific reason why you are using ecvt()/fcvt()/
>gcvt() and providing a compatibilty "layer" for BSD instead of using
>standard functions?

Last weekend, I created an autoconf test for your problem....

I desperadely hope that this change will be unique among *BSD implementations
(e.g. I hope that no other *BSD will implement a reentrant __dtoa() in
a different way so I cannot use my autoconf test anymore).

Please check cdrtools-1.10a14 or newer.

Jörg
